Class Peg

java.lang.Object
scorefour.model.Peg
public class Peg extends Object
A Peg contains 4 empty spaces for Bead's which can be added or removed.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Peg(int y)
    Constructs a new Peg at a specified y location.
    Peg(Peg peg)
    Constructs a copy of a Peg into a new peg.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addBead(BeadColour colour)
    Adds a Bead to the Peg.
    void
    clearBeads()
    Clears all Bead's from the Peg from top to bottom.
    Bead[]
    getBeads()
    Gets an array of all the Bead's on the Peg.
    int
    getY()
    Returns the y location of the Peg.
    boolean
    isFull()
    Checks whether the Peg contains any Bead's.
    void
    removeBead()
    Removes a Bead from the top position of the Peg.

  • Constructor Details

    • Peg

      public Peg(int y)
      Constructs a new Peg at a specified y location.
      Parameters:
      y - location for the Peg on the Board.

    • Peg

      public Peg(Peg peg)
      Constructs a copy of a Peg into a new peg.
      Parameters:
      peg - to be copied

  • Method Details

    • addBead

      public void addBead(BeadColour colour)
      Adds a Bead to the Peg.
      Parameters:
      colour - the colour of the bead

    • removeBead

      public void removeBead()
      Removes a Bead from the top position of the Peg.

    • clearBeads

      public void clearBeads()
      Clears all Bead's from the Peg from top to bottom.

    • isFull

      public boolean isFull()
      Checks whether the Peg contains any Bead's.
      Returns:
      boolean

    • getBeads

      public Bead[] getBeads()
      Gets an array of all the Bead's on the Peg.
      Returns:
      an array of Bead's

    • getY

      public int getY()
      Returns the y location of the Peg.
      Returns:
      integer
